# created

**Instance Property**

Information about when the record was created on the server. The properties of this object are: `timestamp` (`Number`), the time at which the record was created, and `user` (`String`), the ID of the user who created the record. This field is used by the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordsResponse] class. The value of this field is set by the server. Omit this key when saving a record.

## Declaration

```swift
attribute Object created;
```
title: created
